title: Will the 7-day moving average of transit calls through the Strait of Hormuz be above 60 before June 15, 2026?

current.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 2%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
current.rationale_summary: Held: 7-day MA ~3-6 vs 60 threshold; cannot reach 60 by Jun 15.
reference_classes: no strait recovers to >50% normal in 48h

history.lean_note: I lean NO (my prob 2%) but it isn't +EV at the ask — no value bet (betting the other side would contradict my forecast).
history.rationale_summary: The Hormuz 7-day transit MA is ~3-6 vs the 60 threshold amid an ongoing closure since Feb 2026; a moving average cannot mathematically jump to 60 by June 15 even if a deal were signed today.
reference_classes: no strait recovers to >50% normal in 48h
